name: AI Free Tier Change History
description: Append-only record of every change to the AI Free Tier Ledger: structured before/after values with dates. Wording edits appear alongside real limit changes.

changes.old: ~5 Pro searches / day
changes.new: ~5 Pro searches / day, a few Deep Research runs / day

changes.old: No Deep Research, Labs or premium model picker on the free plan.
changes.new: No Labs or premium model picker on the free plan; Deep Research is capped to a handful of runs a day.
changes.note: Correction: Perplexity's own Deep Research announcement says non-subscribers get a limited number of runs per day, so 'No Deep Research' was too absolute.

changes.old: Fastest inference around (~2,000 tokens/sec) on Llama-family models.
changes.new: Fastest inference around (~2,000 tokens/sec) on a rotating lineup of open-weight models (Llama, Qwen, GPT-OSS).

changes.old: Small model selection compared to other providers.
changes.new: Small model lineup that rotates often: a model you rely on can disappear from the free tier.

changes.old: Daily credits, no watermark, best-in-class text rendering inside images. Commercial use explicitly allowed.
changes.new: Weekly credits, no watermark, best-in-class text rendering inside images. Commercial use explicitly allowed.

changes.old: 10 credits/day, slow queue
changes.new: 10 slow credits/week, resets Saturday 00:00 UTC
changes.note: Correction: Ideogram's official pricing page lists the free allowance as weekly, not daily. Flagged by a ChatGPT cross-check.

changes.old: Free generations are public in the community gallery.
changes.new: Free generations are public in the community gallery, and the weekly allowance is a fraction of the old 10/day.

changes.old: Monthly credit allowance
changes.new: 50 credits/day, no rollover; free credits cover Veo 3.1 Lite/Fast/Quality only
changes.note: Pinned down from Google's official Flow help page (support.google.com/flow/answer/16526234).

changes.old: Needs a GPU (8GB+ VRAM for comfort) and some setup patience. Check each model's license.
changes.new: Needs a GPU (8GB+ VRAM for comfort) and some setup patience. Licenses differ per model: FLUX.1 schnell is Apache-2.0, FLUX.1 dev is non-commercial.

changes.old: Small daily credit pool in the Dream Machine app.
changes.new: Small monthly credit pool in the Dream Machine web and iOS apps.

changes.old: Roughly one short 720p clip per day, no audio
changes.new: Monthly credits: web amount unpublished, iOS app lists 250/mo. 720p drafts, no audio
changes.note: Correction: Luma's official pricing support page describes monthly credits, not a daily pool.

changes.old: Permanent watermark, non-commercial only, and unused daily credits don't roll over.
changes.new: Permanent watermark, non-commercial only, and Luma doesn't publish the web free credit amount.

changes.old: Daily message cap, varies with demand
changes.new: ~15-40 msgs per 5 h session window, varies with demand
changes.note: Wording clarification, not a Claude change: the cap is a 5-hour session window, not daily.

changes.old: Real ongoing free tier on most Gemini models via AI Studio, including multimodal.
changes.new: Real ongoing free tier on Gemini Flash models via AI Studio, including multimodal.

changes.old: Per model, e.g. Flash ~1,500 req/day, Pro ~50 req/day. Resets midnight PT
changes.new: Flash only, e.g. Gemini 3 Flash ~1,500 req/day; exact per-project quotas shown in AI Studio
changes.note: Pro models left the free tier in April 2026; Google no longer publishes exact free-tier quotas.

changes.old: Enabling billing on the project kills the free tier instantly. Free-tier data may be used for training.
changes.new: Pro models were pulled from the free tier in April 2026. Enabling billing on the project kills the free tier instantly. Free-tier data may be used for training.

changes.old: 200 req/day across free models
changes.new: 50 req/day (20 req/min) across free models
changes.note: Correction: the 200/day figure was outdated. OpenRouter's cap is 50/day without a one-time $10 credit purchase, 1,000/day with it.

changes.new: Terminal coding agent on Gemini models with a personal Google account. Successor to Gemini CLI, which Google shut down for consumer accounts on June 18, 2026.
changes.note: Replaces the Gemini CLI row. Free quota is roughly 20 agent requests/day, shared with the Antigravity IDE.

changes.old: ~25 agent (Cascade) actions/month
changes.new: Daily/weekly quota, ~5 agent (Cascade) actions/day
changes.note: Correction of our earlier listing: the March 2026 quota is daily, not monthly.

changes.old: Pricing was overhauled in March 2026 (credits replaced by quotas); premium models stay gated to paid plans.
changes.new: Pricing was overhauled in March 2026 (credits replaced by daily/weekly quotas); premium models stay gated to paid plans.

changes.old: No commercial use, no stem separation, shared (slower) queue.
changes.new: No commercial use and no downloads: free songs are listen-only inside Suno since the late-2025 Warner deal. Shared (slower) queue.
changes.note: Downloads were removed for free accounts after the late-2025 Warner licensing deal; recorded when caught.

changes.old: Full terminal coding agent with a personal Google account.
changes.note: Shut down by Google for consumer accounts on 2026-06-18; successor is Antigravity CLI. Flagged by a reader via the corrections form.

changes.old: ~30 req/min, 14,400 req/day (llama-3.3-70b)
changes.new: ~30 req/min, 1,000 req/day, 100K tokens/day (llama-3.3-70b)
changes.note: Cut happened earlier in 2026; recorded when verified.

changes.old: One-time $5 welcome credit for new accounts (discontinued mid-2025)
changes.new: Daily free-token allowance with API data-sharing opt-in: up to ~1M tokens/day on frontier models, ~10M/day on mini models
changes.note: Recorded when verified; the data-sharing program replaced the welcome credit.

changes.old: Free Imagen-family generation with a Google account
changes.note: Shut down April 2026, folded into Google Flow.

changes.new: Imagen image generation and limited Veo video with a Google account, monthly credit allowance

changes.old: Monthly prompt-credit allowance
changes.new: Unlimited Tab autocomplete, ~25 agent (Cascade) actions/month
changes.note: Pricing overhauled March 2026: credits replaced by daily/weekly quotas.

changes.old: Daily message caps, unpublished
changes.new: Compute-based caps refreshing every 5 h with a weekly ceiling; 5 Deep Research uses/month
changes.note: Google switched the free app plan from message counts to compute-based limits.

changes.old: Limits are dynamic
changes.new: Limits are dynamic; opting out of personalized ads can cut the free cap to as low as ~5 msgs / 3 h
